[2018-07-11 00:59] extratricky: short answer is "it depends"
[2018-07-11 00:59] extratricky: if you buy tia too early then your opponent will be able to defend easily and then your lower economy will make it hard for you to keep up with their attack
[2018-07-11 01:00] extratricky: but if you buy tia at the right time they invest so much on defense that they often attack for less, so you have to defend for less
[2018-07-11 01:00] cachotognax: thinking about it in every game at some point you stop getting economy and start gettign attack, at some point you would rather decrese your economy for attack.
